name: Integration/API Builder Pack
when_to_use: Работа с third-party APIs, retries, rate limits, idempotency keys, webhook handling, auth, schema drift и безопасным потреблением secret aliases/handles вместо raw credentials.
Seed rationale: Для BuildAgent-Integrations под контролем IntegrationAgent.
inputs: Должен генерировать resilient integration code and test doubles. Обязан уважать integration_brief и auth_decision_record, потреблять только sanitized auth artifacts/aliases, строить retry/backoff/idempotency, логирование, DLQ/replay hooks и failure classification.
steps: TBD: convert the seed build spec into a stable step-by-step skill contract.
stop_conditions: TBD: define success and stop boundaries before runtime consumption.
escalation_rules: Escalate when the required source-of-truth inputs are missing, contradictory, or blocked by a human-owned zone.
anti_patterns: Do not duplicate always-on repo guidance inside selective skills.
Do not silently widen role scope beyond the owning skill pack.
denied_actions: Do not treat this skeleton metadata as runtime-ready execution logic before the later runtime-consumption blocks.
description: Работа с third-party APIs, retries, rate limits, idempotency keys, webhook handling, auth, schema drift и безопасным потреблением secret aliases/handles вместо raw credentials.
build_spec: Должен генерировать resilient integration code and test doubles. Обязан уважать integration_brief и auth_decision_record, потреблять только sanitized auth artifacts/aliases, строить retry/backoff/idempotency, логирование, DLQ/replay hooks и failure classification.
